summary: Completed frontend authentication testing for Prop Forge Supabase integration. App loads correctly on localhost but has critical Supabase authentication issues preventing login/registration. External URL routing is broken. Core app functionality (tabs navigation) works normally.

critical_bugs.issue: Both registration and login fail with 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error
critical_bugs.impact: Complete authentication system failure - users cannot register or login
critical_bugs.console_error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400

critical_bugs.issue: External preview URL shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' instead of the app
critical_bugs.impact: App not accessible via public URL, only works on localhost:3000

integration_issues.issue: Modal remains open after failed authentication attempts

passed_tests: Header with PROP·FORGE branding displays correctly
Sign in button opens authentication modal
Authentication modal has proper sign in/sign up tabs
Email truncation function exists in code
Chamber tab content loads and displays correctly
Tab switching between Chamber, Strategy, Oracle, Gloss works normally
App UI and navigation work properly when not authenticated
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase authentication integration - both registration and login are completely broken with 'body stream already read' error. This suggests an issue with response handling in the auth context or Supabase client configuration. Also investigate external URL routing issue preventing public access to the app.
